_doc: Configure your Claude subscription type and daily limits. The usage-sentinel hook reads this.

pro.note: Pro: 5-hour usage window. Resets after 5 hours from first message.

max.note: Max: 5× Pro limit. Same 5-hour window structure.

api.note: API billing: set your daily cost limit here.

team.note: Team: per-seat limits, same window as Pro.

_sentinel_notes: usage-sentinel.sh reads this file on every UserPromptSubmit
Change subscription_type to match your account
For API billing, set daily_budget_usd to your comfort limit
Set warn_pct / auto_save_pct to tune when saves are triggered
